sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Blood Code
special_mechanics.description: Hidden button sequence that enables finishing moves triggered by striking opponent in a certain way to end match. Present in Genesis and SNES versions. Subdued blood effects maintained T rating.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical data. Source material is a Wikipedia article focused on game reception, development, and ports rather than technical movement parameters. No quantitative physics documentation available. Qualitative feedback notes 'incredibly fast game speed' and 'ultra sharp controls' from GamePro review.
